title: Ensure that the latest OS Patches for all Virtual Machines are  applied

input_row.title: Ensure that the latest OS Patches for all Virtual Machines are  applied
input_row.description: Ensure that the latest OS patches for all virtual machines are applied.
input_row.rationale: Windows and Linux virtual machines should be kept updated to: • Address a specific bug or flaw • Improve an OS or application’s general stability • Fix a security vulnerability The Alibaba Cloud Security Center checks for the latest updates in Linux and Windows systems. If an ECS instance is missing a system update, the Security Center will recommend system updates be applied.
input_row.audit: 1. Logon to Security Center Console 2. Select Vulnerabilities 3. Ensure all vulnerabilities are fixed
input_row.remediation: 1. Logon to Security Center Console 2. Select Vulnerabilities 3. Apply all patches for vulnerabilities
input_row.default_value: By default, patches are not automatically deployed.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. Log in to the Alibaba Cloud Security Center Console.
   - Navigate to the **Security Center** by selecting it from the main management console.
  
2. Select **Vulnerabilities** from the Security Center dashboard.
   - This will take you to a page listing all current vulnerabilities.

3. Review the list of vulnerabilities for all virtual machines (ECS instances).
   - Ensure that you are filtering or checking for updates on both Windows and Linux virtual machines.

4. Verify that all vulnerabilities are fixed.
   - Look for a status indicating whether each vulnerability has been addressed. This may include indications of whether patches have been applied or are pending.

5. Take note of any virtual machines that are indicated as having unpatched vulnerabilities.
   - These machines need attention to ensure they are up to date with the latest OS patches.

6. Apply patches for any identified vulnerabilities.
   - Follow the procedure provided by Alibaba Cloud Security Center to remediate the issues, typically found next to the vulnerabilities listed.

**Expected secure configuration:**
- All virtual machines (ECS instances) should be updated and show no pending vulnerabilities related to OS patches.

**How to confirm compliance:**
- Compliance can be confirmed by the absence of vulnerabilities listed in the Security Center; all identified issues should have a status indicating they are fixed, and all required patches should be applied to maintain system integrity.
